name: 布匹
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: realistic 1m width with shoulder as anchor
reference_context_policy: body partial shoulder as scale anchor no clear stranger faces
reference_prompt: Two rolls of plain white cotton fabric each 1m wide rolled up placed statically on a human shoulder for scale no visible faces or text close-up product style neutral background。源记录硬约束：数量:2；位置:林辰肩上；运动政策:静止
